en.name: Luffy & Ace
en.effectText: If you have a Character with 7000 base power or more, give this Leader −2000 power.[Opponent's Turn] All of your [Portgas.D.Ace] and [Monkey.D.Luffy] cards gain +3000 power.

jp.name: ルフィ＆エース
jp.effectText: 自分の元々のパワー7000以上のキャラがいる場合、このリーダーのパワー-2000。【相手のターン中】自分の「ポートガス・Ｄ・エース」と「モンキー・Ｄ・ルフィ」すべてを、パワー+3000。

definition.name: Luffy & Ace
definition.text: If you have a Character with 7000 base power or more, give this Leader −2000 power.[Opponent's Turn] All of your [Portgas.D.Ace] and [Monkey.D.Luffy] cards gain +3000 power.

en.name: Inazuma
en.effectText: [On Play] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 Character card with 6000 power and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.

jp.name: イナズマ
jp.effectText: 【登場時】自分のデッキの上から5枚を見て、パワー6000のキャラカード1枚までを公開し、手札に加える。その後、残りを好きな順番でデッキの下に置く。

definition.name: Inazuma
definition.text: [On Play] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 Character card with 6000 power and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.

en.name: Edward.Newgate
en.effectText: [Your Turn] All of your Characters with 6000 base power gain +1000 power.

jp.name: エドワード・ニューゲート
jp.effectText: 【自分のターン中】自分の元々のパワー6000のキャラすべてを、パワー+1000。

definition.name: Edward.Newgate
definition.text: [Your Turn] All of your Characters with 6000 base power gain +1000 power.

en.name: Emporio.Ivankov
en.effectText: [On Play] You may reveal 2 Character cards with 6000 power from your hand: Draw 3 cards and trash 2 cards from your hand.

jp.name: エンポリオ・イワンコフ
jp.effectText: 【登場時】自分の手札からパワー6000のキャラカード2枚を公開できる：カード3枚を引き、自分の手札2枚を捨てる。

definition.name: Emporio.Ivankov
definition.text: [On Play] You may reveal 2 Character cards with 6000 power from your hand: Draw 3 cards and trash 2 cards from your hand.

en.name: Jinbe
en.effectText: [On Play] You may trash 1 Character card with 6000 power from your hand: Draw 2 cards.

jp.name: ジンベエ
jp.effectText: 【登場時】自分の手札からパワー6000のキャラカード1枚を捨てることができる：カード2枚を引く。

definition.name: Jinbe
definition.text: [On Play] You may trash 1 Character card with 6000 power from your hand: Draw 2 cards.

en.name: Portgas.D.Ace
en.effectText: [On Play] You may rest 1 of your DON!! cards: This Character gains [Rush] during this turn.(This card can attack on the turn in which it is played.)[When Attacking] Give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −1000 power during this turn.

jp.name: ポートガス・Ｄ・エース
jp.effectText: 【登場時】自分のドン!!1枚をレストにできる：このキャラは、このターン中、【速攻】を得る。(このカードは登場したターンにアタックできる)【アタック時】相手のキャラ1枚までを、このターン中、パワー-1000。

definition.name: Portgas.D.Ace
definition.text: [On Play] You may rest 1 of your DON!! cards: This Character gains [Rush] during this turn.(This card can attack on the turn in which it is played.)[When Attacking] Give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −1000 power during this turn.

en.name: Marco
en.effectText: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)[On K.O.] You may trash 1 Character card with 6000 power from your hand: Play this Character card from your trash rested.

jp.name: マルコ
jp.effectText: 【ブロッカー】(相手のアタックの後、このカードをレストにし、アタックの対象をこのカードにできる)【KO時】自分の手札からパワー6000のキャラカード1枚を捨てることができる：このキャラカードをトラッシュからレストで登場させる。

definition.name: Marco
definition.text: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)[On K.O.] You may trash 1 Character card with 6000 power from your hand: Play this Character card from your trash rested.

en.name: LittleOars Jr.
en.effectText: If your Character with 6000 base power would be removed from the field by your opponent's effect, you may trash this Character and draw 1 card instead.

jp.name: リトルオーズJr.
jp.effectText: 自分の元々のパワー6000のキャラが相手の効果で場を離れる場合、代わりにこのキャラをトラッシュに置き、カード1枚を引くことができる。

definition.name: LittleOars Jr.
definition.text: If your Character with 6000 base power would be removed from the field by your opponent's effect, you may trash this Character and draw 1 card instead.

en.name: Crocodile
en.effectText: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)[On Play] Up to 1 of your opponent's rested Characters will not become active in your opponent's next Refresh Phase.

jp.name: クロコダイル
jp.effectText: 【ブロッカー】(相手のアタックの後、このカードをレストにし、アタックの対象をこのカードにできる)【登場時】相手のレストのキャラ1枚までは、次の相手のリフレッシュフェイズでアクティブにならない。

definition.name: Crocodile
definition.text: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)[On Play] Up to 1 of your opponent's rested Characters will not become active in your opponent's next Refresh Phase.

en.name: Buggy
en.effectText: If your Character with 6000 base power would be removed from the field by your opponent's effect, you may rest this Character instead.[Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)

jp.name: バギー
jp.effectText: 自分の元々のパワー6000のキャラが相手の効果で場を離れる場合、代わりにこのキャラをレストにできる。【ブロッカー】(相手のアタックの後、このカードをレストにし、アタックの対象をこのカードにできる)

definition.name: Buggy
definition.text: If your Character with 6000 base power would be removed from the field by your opponent's effect, you may rest this Character instead.[Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)

en.name: Monkey.D.Luffy
en.effectText: [On Play] You may rest 1 of your DON!! cards: This Character gains [Rush] during this turn.(This card can attack on the turn in which it is played.)[When Attacking] Rest up to 1 of your opponent's [Blocker] Characters.

jp.name: モンキー・D・ルフィ
jp.effectText: 【登場時】自分のドン!!枚をレストにできる：このキャラは、このターン中、【速攻】を得る。(このカードは登場したターンにアタックできる)【アタック時】相手の【ブロッカー】を持つキャラ1枚までを、レストにする。

definition.name: Monkey.D.Luffy
definition.text: [On Play] You may rest 1 of your DON!! cards: This Character gains [Rush] during this turn.(This card can attack on the turn in which it is played.)[When Attacking] Rest up to 1 of your opponent's [Blocker] Characters.

jp.name: Mr.2・ボン・クレー(ベンサム)

en.name: Mr.3(Galdino)
en.effectText: [Activate: Main] You may rest this Character: Give up to 2 of your Characters with 6000 base power up to 2 rested DON!! cards each.

jp.name: Mr.3(ギャルディーノ)
jp.effectText: 【起動メイン】このキャラをレストにできる：自分の元々のパワー6000のキャラ2枚までにレストのドン!!2枚ずつまでを、付与する。

definition.name: Mr.3(Galdino)
definition.text: [Activate: Main] You may rest this Character: Give up to 2 of your Characters with 6000 base power up to 2 rested DON!! cards each.

en.name: The Name of This Era Is "Whitebeard"!!
en.effectText: [Counter] If you have 2 or more Characters with 6000 base power, up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +4000 power during this battle. [Trigger] K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with 6000 power or less.

jp.name: この時代の名が!!!"白ひげ"だァ!!!
jp.effectText: 【カウンター】自分の元々のパワー6000のキャラが2枚以上いる場合、自分のリーダーかキャラ1枚までを、このバトル中、パワー+4000。 【トリガー】相手のパワー6000以下のキャラ1枚までを、KOする。

definition.name: The Name of This Era Is "Whitebeard"!!
definition.text: [Counter] If you have 2 or more Characters with 6000 base power, up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +4000 power during this battle. [Trigger] K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with 6000 power or less.

en.name: Can You Still Fight, Luffy?! Of Course!!
en.effectText: [Counter] Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +3000 power during this battle. Then, if you have [Portgas.D.Ace] and [Monkey.D.Luffy] Characters with 6000 base power, draw 1 card.

jp.name: 戦えるかルフィ!!!勿論だ!!!
jp.effectText: 【カウンター】自分のリーダーかキャラ1枚までを、このバトル中、パワー+3000。その後、自分の元々のパワー6000のキャラの、「ポートガス・Ｄ・エース」と「モンキー・D・ルフィ」がいる場合、カード1枚を引く。

definition.name: Can You Still Fight, Luffy?! Of Course!!
definition.text: [Counter] Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +3000 power during this battle. Then, if you have [Portgas.D.Ace] and [Monkey.D.Luffy] Characters with 6000 base power, draw 1 card.

en.name: And You Get Yourself in Big Trouble!!
en.effectText: [Main] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 Character card with 6000 power and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order. [Trigger] Activate this card's [Main] effect.

jp.name: 無茶ばっかりしやがって!!!
jp.effectText: 【メイン】自分のデッキの上から5枚を見て、パワー6000のキャラカード1枚までを公開し、手札に加える。その後、残りを好きな順番でデッキの下に置く。 【トリガー】このカードの【メイン】効果を発動する。

definition.name: And You Get Yourself in Big Trouble!!
definition.text: [Main] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 Character card with 6000 power and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order. [Trigger] Activate this card's [Main] effect.
